h5b5f8988g6affg4aa2gbd57g6b6a8bcda1da: We know that you must go, great Mahkloompah. We will tend your church down here, and wait... until the time is right.
h991b543egef45g43e8g90a7gb8a903a70bfe: You've slain the pretender! We knew in our hearts the god BOOOAL was false.
h03b5b125ge698g48bfg856bg27fdede21330: But you - we see you. We know you by your true name... MAHKLOOMPAH!
h8d8cec2eg290eg4297g8fa6g543b23ee5c27: A god to the fishes. A dream come true, is it?
h117a6af7g3669g4ba7g96e7g4f0977198e33: What is to be your first commandment, oh great god?
h00e7b315g9f12g43fag9ca2g1f3898cc5867: A better name than 'Mahkloompah', for one.
h06073e58g0af4g4c1agadaegc8a39d29f597: You are too modest, great one. This name perfectly captures your essence - your fury.
h5c728882g91eeg4dd8g9b7aga737220d4600: We will spread word of Mahkloompah. Your glory will sing from ten thousand throats!
h5797eeccg9589g4999ga603g5a5d72d0d13b: Go out and build me an army.
hbfafb0d1g9440g4521g8cabgd732e7e1f903: ... you test us, great one. There are other ways of showing devotion.
h48bd7affgcacbg46dfg8009g822b8b1c3260: Strangulation, perhaps. No matter - your glory will be sung, great Mahkloompah!
hb3acb894g20e4g46f8g98a8g4451336a3372: Just keep doing what you're doing.
h5c86410fg1744g43a2ga64agb331f2e6bfb9: Our blood to fill your oceans, great Mahkloompah! Our bones to build your temple in the deep!
h310f066bg0650g4843ga036gfcb53f7aa31f: Perhaps you should study the teachings of my god.
h9aea6bb0g09f1g42c1g952dg148b65ba2089: Yes - yes! We will study this being who claims power over you, great Mahkloompah.
h48442f6bgcdfdg4e76ga3b4g8d193b8935fb: So that, one day... we might destroy them.
h9fcfe4aag593cg4d35g93e2g880c9c67779a: If you're expecting me to drop to my knees before you, forget it.
h9111208bg82c5g4e8cg8c43g01173de8bec0: If they ask for a sacrifice, I'd suggest virgins. Young and hot-blooded.
h82dd2cf1gc849g415fgb048ge23046f524e1: Oh hells, why not? All hail MAHKLOOMPAH!
hede6df69gc3c2g4954g91aegc75540c26fcd: A great deity needs a great name. Looks like you're off to a good start.
